action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the environment, including the last viewed item ID (current_item_id), cumulative engagement score, current user fatigue level, and session status.

action_set_definitions.name: search_archive_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the content archive for nodes matching a specific topic or latent entity. This tool automatically filters out content with ASR confidence < 0.75 or 'TK-Restricted' labels to ensure ethical compliance and quality.

topic_query.description: The keyword or topic to search for (e.g., '1930s Labor History').

latent_entity.description: An optional latent entity to narrow search for bridging topics (e.g., 'textile mill songs').

action_set_definitions.name: evaluate_transition
action_set_definitions.description: Predicts the impact of moving from the current node to a target node. Returns affective distance and predicted metric increments.

source_item_id.description: The ID of the currently viewed or starting node.

target_item_id.description: The ID of the candidate node to transition to.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_recommendation
action_set_definitions.description: Executes the recommendation to the user, finalizing the transition and updating environment state values.

item_id.description: The unique identifier of the node to serve.

state_description.active_user_profile: A mapping of content categories (e.g., tech, sports, art) to the user's current interest level (0.0 to 1.0).
state_description.session_history: A list of item IDs that have been recommended to the user in the current session to prevent over-saturation.
state_description.user_fatigue_level: A value from 0.0 to 1.0 representing the user's likelihood to exit the session due to repetitive content.
state_description.cumulative_engagement_score: The aggregate satisfaction score of the user based on previous interactions in this session.
state_description.is_session_active: Indicates if the user is still browsing or has closed the application.
